summary: Full refactor regression for P1 server.py split (core+models+routes/*). Backend: 27/27 pytest cases pass covering auth (register/login/admin role/bad-pw), user profile (no _id/no password), language toggle, catalog (16 subjects, 5 levels, level-1 stages with is_unlocked), quiz (play no correct_answer leak, submit returns score+progression+difficulty_gained, /user/progression, /progress/stats, /progress/history with subject_breakdown and no results), leaderboard/welcome/notices, admin guards (403 for demo on /admin/*), admin questions CRUD + sequence + bulk-delete (empty=400, valid returns count) + CSV bulk upload (3 uploaded, 1 skipped with row error), admin notices round-trip, admin users (no password leaked) + detail (recent_quiz_history), admin reports (all 4 keys), and LIVE Competition tournament create→list→delete regression. Frontend: demo dashboard renders Monster Huddle mascot panel on LEFT spanning Welcome+Current Level; /live Tournaments tab works (no 't is not a function' crash); admin Manage Questions Add flow opens QuestionForm modal, submitting with Question English + option-en-0/option-en-1 yields 'Question created' toast, new row appears at TOP, bulk-select via select-question-{id} + bulk-delete-btn UI button works.

minor.issue: User documents are heterogeneous — some legacy docs have only `name` (and no `username`/`current_grade` etc.) while newer registered users have the full schema. Endpoint returns them all without normalisation. Not breaking but UI consumers must handle both shapes. Pre-existing, not caused by refactor.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' caused by Emergent visual-editor wrapper spans. Functional but generates console noise. Same noise reported in iteration_2; not introduced by this refactor.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now a clean 38-line entrypoint — good. Wires CORS, /api router, and live_router cleanly.
routes/__init__.py composes 6 sub-routers under /api prefix — idiomatic FastAPI structure.
All endpoints correctly exclude `_id` via {'_id': 0} projection.
admin/users does not project out `subject_progress` which can be large for legacy users; consider trimming for list view (minor perf).
auth.register and login now share regex + pwd_context from core — DRY preserved.
quiz.submit_stage correctly auto-advances multiple levels in a while-loop (preserved from original).
Bulk CSV upload validation matches spec: option_a_en + option_b_en required; correct_answer pointing to empty option produces per-row error and is skipped.
_validate_question_media size caps (~1MB image, ~3MB audio) properly enforced with 413.

success_rate.backend: 100% (27/27 pytest passed: auth 4/4, user profile 2/2, catalog 3/3, quiz 5/5, community 3/3, admin guards 1/1, admin questions 4/4, notices 1/1, admin users 2/2, reports 1/1, live regression 1/1)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin login, dashboard mascot panel, /live tournaments tab, admin Manage Questions Add flow + QuestionForm + toast + UI bulk-delete all verified)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_RR prefixed questions/notices/tournaments and a TEST_<uuid> registered user. All admin questions + notices + live tournaments are cleaned up by their own tests. One TEST_RR registered user remains in db.users per run (no DELETE endpoint exercised). UI smoke also creates and removes one TEST_RR Playwright Q.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app/backend/tests && pytest test_refactor_regression.py -v (≈6s, no WS). For live competition deeper regression, also run test_live_competition.py (≈65s). UI flow: admin Manage Questions Add Question form requires Question (English) textarea (the only required textarea — use page.locator('textarea[required]').first or nth(2)), plus data-testid option-en-0 / option-en-1; Save button label is 'Save'. Toast text on success is exactly 'Question created'. Bulk delete row selector: [data-testid=select-question-{id}]; bulk button: [data-testid=bulk-delete-btn]. The pre-existing select/option hydration warning on /live remains; not a regression.
rca of the issue: N/A — refactor is behaviour-preserving. No issues found.
